operator_meaning: Authoritative save may render quietly because settlement and continuity both agree.
Background tabs may inspect the draft without taking the mutable lane.
Background tabs may not mutate and must land in governed recovery instead of silent overwrite.
Conflicting writes open DraftMergePlan instead of last-write-wins.
Writable resume is suspended until the same lineage is revalidated.
Promoted drafts may route only to request recovery or the mapped request shell.
